zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mowbray於大約1361年出生在英國林可爾史爾艾普沃斯時，她的父親Sir John de Mowbray III22歲，母親Elizabeth Segrave24歲。她與Reynold Lucy在英國英格蘭德比夏爾雷普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1401年7月11日之前在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維吉頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Mowbray于大约1361年出生在英国林可爾史爾艾普沃斯时，她的父亲Sir John de Mowbray III22岁，母亲Elizabeth Segrave24岁。她与Reynold Lucy在英国英格兰德比夏爾雷普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1401年7月11日之前在英国英格兰賀特福爾維吉頓。

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mowbray was born about 1361, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir John de Mowbray III, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Segrave, was 24. She married Reynold Lucy in Repton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 11 July 1401, in Wigginton, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mowbray est née environ 1361, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Mowbray III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Segrave, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Reynold Lucy à Repton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 11 juillet 1401, à Wigginton, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mowbray um 1361 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Mowbray III 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Segrave 24. Sie hat in Repton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Reynold Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 11. Juli 1401 in Wigginton, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mowbray è nata il circa 1361 nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Mowbray III, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Segrave, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Reynold Lucy nel Repton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 11 luglio 1401, nel Wigginton, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mowbrayが約1361年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Mowbray IIIは22歳，母Elizabeth Segraveは24歳であった。イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアレプトンでReynold Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1401年7月11日以前にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウィグジントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mowbray(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 링코실르 p워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Mowbray III(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Segrave(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 레프턴에서 Reynold Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 7월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 위긴턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mowbray nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Mowbray III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Segrave, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Reynold Lucy em Repton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 11 de julho de 1401, em Wigginton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mowbray родилась около 1361 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Mowbray III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Segrave, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reynold Lucy в местности рептон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 11 июля 1401 г. в местности вигинтон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
